descriptionTemplate: Winkle gains [Energy:Arg1] Aliemus. {Rouse}: Winkle's Shield and {Counter} increase by 10%. After playing a card, gain [Energy:Arg2] Aliemus and [Counterattack:Arg3] {plural:[Counterattack:Arg3]|stack|stacks} of {Counter}.

patch.descriptionTemplate: Winkle gains [Energy:Arg1] Aliemus. {Rouse}: Shield and {Counter} generated by Winkle +10%. After playing a card, gain [Energy:Arg2] Aliemus and [Counterattack:Arg3] {plural:[Counterattack:Arg3]|stack|stacks} of {Counter}. Grant 50 Aliemus to the other Awakener with the lowest Aliemus.
